Section 07 92 00 - Joint Sealants

1.1 - Summary
This section includes joint sealant materials and installation.

2.1 - Products
Manufacturer: Dow Corning
Product: 795 Silicone Building Sealant
Basis of Design: Dow Corning 795

2.2 - Requirements
The sealant shall comply with ASTM C920, Type S, Grade NS.
Joint width must be minimum 1/4" and maximum 1".
Primer is required on all porous substrates.

3.1 - Execution
All joints must be clean, dry, and free of contaminants.
Model No: 795-SBS
